dataset: Avare Aviation GPS App - Real World Airport Database

pi_items.source: AirNav and multiple aviation databases confirm this as the official airport name for KSFO. Located in San Francisco, California, USA. This is a major international airport serving the San Francisco Bay Area.

privileged_info_summary: KSFO is the valid ICAO airport code for San Francisco International Airport, a major international airport located in San Francisco, California. Both metadata claims regarding the target airport identifier and the airport name are accurate and correspond to real-world aviation database entries used by Avare aviation GPS app.
